quests.how: You need the camera (from 'A Mystery in the Depths') and must have changed the paraglider design once so Sayge will offer this. Photograph a regular (not elemental) Chuchu, then show Sayge the picture to receive the Chuchu Fabric.

quests.name: Teach Me a Lesson
quests.giver: Symin, inside the Hateno Village school (daytime)
quests.location: Hateno Village (East Necluda); a photo is taken in Kakariko Village
quests.reward: Rupees (and the school field opens up, leading to 'Uma's Garden')
quests.oneLine: The teacher needs Compendium photos of historical sites to teach the kids about the past.
quests.how: Talk to Symin by day and accept his photo requests (including the mural in Kakariko Village). Take the pictures with your camera and show him. Completing the chain frees the school's field, which starts 'Uma's Garden'.

quests.name: Uma's Garden
quests.giver: Uma, at the field beside the Hateno Village school
quests.reward: A grown crop of whatever produce you provided
quests.oneLine: An old woman will grow a vegetable for you if you give her a sample to plant.
quests.how: Finish 'Teach Me a Lesson' first to open the field. Give Uma one sample of a growable crop (Sun Pumpkin, Swift Carrot, Hylian Tomato, etc.). Leave and come back later (about an in-game day) to harvest the grown crop and complete the quest.

quests.name: A Letter to Koyin
quests.giver: Koyin, at Hateno Pasture in Hateno Village
quests.reward: Hateno Cheese (used to start 'A New Signature Food')
quests.oneLine: Koyin asks you to fish a dropped message bottle out of the pasture pond.
quests.how: A Message Bottle floats in the pasture pond. Chop nearby trees, Ultrahand the logs into a raft to reach it (or build out to it), grab the bottle, and bring it to Koyin. Talk to her again at the ranch house and she thanks you with Hateno Cheese.

quests.name: A New Signature Food
quests.giver: Reede, in Hateno Village
quests.reward: 100 Rupees; counts toward 'The Mayoral Election'
quests.oneLine: Reede wants to recreate his grandfather's signature dish and needs an ingredient.
quests.how: Get Hateno Cheese first by completing 'A Letter to Koyin'. Bring that Hateno Cheese to Reede; he uses it for his recipe and rewards you with 100 Rupees. This is one of the four prerequisites for 'The Mayoral Election'.

quests.name: Team Cece or Team Reede?
quests.giver: Cece, at her hat shop in Hateno Village
quests.reward: Progress toward 'The Mayoral Election'
quests.oneLine: Mayoral candidate Cece asks you to sway the village's undecided voters.
quests.how: Cece gives you mushrooms to hand out to the last undecided villagers around Hateno to win them over. Deliver them all (talk to each holdout) to finish her campaign errand. One of the four prerequisites for 'The Mayoral Election'.

quests.name: Cece's Secret
quests.giver: Sophie (Cece's sister), in Hateno Village
quests.reward: 10 Ironshrooms; progress toward 'The Mayoral Election'
quests.oneLine: Find out the secret the hat-loving mayoral candidate Cece is hiding.
quests.how: At night, follow/peek at Cece to catch her secretly eating carrots, despite campaigning against farming. Report the secret to complete the quest for 10 Ironshrooms. One of the four prerequisites for 'The Mayoral Election'.

quests.name: Reede's Secret
quests.giver: Clavia (Reede's wife), in Hateno Village
quests.reward: 10 Hylian Tomatoes; progress toward 'The Mayoral Election'
quests.oneLine: Uncover what mayoral candidate Reede keeps hidden in his locked shed.
quests.how: Drop down the nearby Hateno well, follow the underground cave until you are beneath the shed, then use Ascend to pop up inside the locked shed. Read Reede's Diary to learn his secret; report back for 10 Hylian Tomatoes. One of the four prerequisites for 'The Mayoral Election'.

quests.name: The Mayoral Election
quests.giver: Sophie, in Hateno Village (daytime, not raining)
quests.reward: Cece Hat
quests.oneLine: Resolve Hateno's mayoral race between Reede and the hat-maker Cece.
quests.how: First complete the four prep quests in any order: 'Team Cece or Team Reede?', 'Cece's Secret', 'Reede's Secret', and 'A New Signature Food'. Then talk to Sophie during the day (when it isn't raining) to hold the election; Cece wins and gives you the Cece Hat.

quests.name: Homegrown in Hateno
quests.giver: Reede, near the Hateno Village entrance
quests.reward: 5 Sun Pumpkins
quests.oneLine: Defend Hateno's restored vegetable field from waves of monsters overnight.
quests.how: Available after 'The Mayoral Election'. Talk to Reede, then guard the field overnight: smash the heads of the Stalkoblins so they can't reassemble, beat the Stalmoblin that appears around 3 a.m., then clear the final archer/Stalmoblin wave (bomb-fused arrows help, or simply survive to 5 a.m. when they vanish). Reede rewards you with 5 Sun Pumpkins.

quests.name: Hateno Village Research Lab
quests.giver: Robbie, at the Hateno Ancient Tech Lab (hill east of Hateno Village)
quests.reward: The Sensor function for the Purah Pad
quests.oneLine: Help Robbie get his shrine Sensor working again.
quests.how: After helping Robbie at Lookout Landing (he relocates to the lab), talk to him at the Hateno Ancient Tech Lab to get the Sensor, then follow his directions until it pings a nearby Shrine of Light; head to the cave below the lab's hill to find and activate that shrine, then report back.

quests.name: Presenting: Sensor +!
quests.giver: Robbie, at the Hateno Ancient Tech Lab
quests.reward: Sensor + upgrade (track any Compendium creature or material)
quests.oneLine: Robbie upgrades the Sensor to detect anything in your Hyrule Compendium.
quests.how: After 'Hateno Village Research Lab' and with the camera (from 'A Mystery in the Depths'), talk to Robbie again at the lab. He upgrades the Purah Pad to Sensor +, letting you set it to ping any registered material or creature.

quests.name: Presenting: Hero's Path Mode!
quests.giver: Robbie, at the Hateno Ancient Tech Lab
quests.reward: Hero's Path Mode for the map
quests.oneLine: Robbie adds a map feature that traces the path you've traveled.
quests.how: Visit at least 15 shrine locations, then talk to Robbie at the lab. He unlocks Hero's Path Mode, which overlays your last ~256 hours of travel on the map.

quests.name: Presenting: The Travel Medallion!
quests.giver: Robbie, at the Hateno Ancient Tech Lab
quests.location: Hateno Ancient Tech Lab (East Necluda); prototype retrieved at Akkala Ancient Tech Lab
quests.reward: Travel Medallion (set one custom fast-travel point)
quests.oneLine: Build a custom fast-travel point after fetching a prototype for Robbie.
quests.how: Robbie sends you to the Yiga-occupied Akkala Ancient Tech Lab. Defeat the Yiga guards at the door, go inside, and open the chest for the Travel Medallion Prototype. Bring it back to Robbie at Hateno; he upgrades the Purah Pad to register the Travel Medallion.

quests.name: Filling Out the Compendium
quests.giver: Robbie, at the Hateno Ancient Tech Lab
quests.reward: Froggy paraglider fabric
quests.oneLine: Robbie wants help completing the Hyrule Compendium.
quests.how: Available after you have the camera. Register enough Compendium entries (or simply buy missing photos from Robbie for 100 Rupees each) to reach the threshold; Robbie then gives you a paraglider fabric you can equip at Sayge's Kochi Dye Shop.

quests.name: Bring Peace to Necluda
quests.giver: Hoz, with his monster-control crew near Fort Hateno (West Necluda, east of Dueling Peaks Stable before the bridge)
quests.location: West Necluda (near Fort Hateno / Dueling Peaks)
quests.reward: 100 Rupees
quests.oneLine: A soldier asks you to help clear the monsters threatening Hyrule Field.
quests.how: Talk to Hoz, then follow him to the attack site and help his crew wipe out every monster there (fused weapons and bomb arrows clear it fast). Return to Hoz and he rewards you with 100 Rupees.

quests.name: A Picture for Dueling Peaks Stable
quests.giver: Tasseren, at Dueling Peaks Stable (examine the empty picture frame)
quests.reward: Pony Point + Hasty Apple Pie
quests.oneLine: The stable owner wants a photo of Hyrule's most beautiful sunrise to hang on his wall.
quests.how: Examine the empty frame and Tasseren asks for a shot of the sunrise from Tuft Mountain (just west of Lurelin). Climb Tuft Mountain and photograph the sunrise between about 4 a.m. and 6 a.m., then show it to Tasseren for a Pony Point and Hasty Apple Pie.

quests.name: Serenade to Cotera
quests.giver: Cotera, at her Great Fairy Fountain near Dueling Peaks Stable
quests.reward: Unlocks Great Fairy Cotera (armor upgrades)
quests.oneLine: Wake Great Fairy Cotera by reuniting the traveling musical troupe at her fountain.
quests.how: Cotera will only awaken for the full band. Bring the missing drummer back by completing 'Honey, Bee Mine' (give Beetz his Courser Bee Honey), then use Ultrahand to ferry the whole troupe across to Cotera's fountain so she awakens and offers armor upgrades.

quests.name: Honey, Bee Mine
quests.giver: Beetz, southwest of Kakariko Village near Bonooru's Stand
quests.location: West Necluda / Dueling Peaks area (drummer of the Dueling Peaks Stable troupe)
quests.reward: 100 Rupees; the drummer rejoins the troupe (advances 'Serenade to Cotera')
quests.oneLine: The troupe's drummer Beetz wants Courser Bee Honey before he'll rejoin the band.
quests.how: Bring Beetz 3 Courser Bee Honey. Harvest it from hanging beehives in the forests (the woods by the Depths entrance near Kakariko are closest) by shooting the hives, or get it as the reward from 'The Hornist's Dramatic Escape'. Give it to Beetz for 100 Rupees; he heads back to Dueling Peaks Stable, feeding into 'Serenade to Cotera'.

quests.name: Mired in Muck
quests.giver: Bazz, stuck in gloom-sludge in front of the Upland Zorana Skyview Tower (Ternio Trail), west of Zora's Domain
quests.reward: Zora Spear
quests.oneLine: The Zora guard captain Bazz is trapped in gloom-sludge and needs water to wash himself free.
quests.how: Pick a Splash Fruit from the little trees right next to Bazz and either throw it at the sludge on him or Fuse it to an arrow (hold ZR, press up on the D-pad) and shoot — the burst of water washes the muck away. Have a free weapon slot, then talk to him for the Zora Spear.

quests.name: A Token of Friendship
quests.giver: Yona, by the Goddess Statue in Zora's Domain (after the Water Temple)
quests.reward: Zora Greaves
quests.oneLine: Yona reveals the Zora had a gift of legwear waiting for Link, hidden away in the old waterworks.
quests.how: Dive into the whirlpool in East Reservoir Lake (east of Zora's Domain) to drop into the drained Ancient Zora Waterworks. Drop through the hole into the large chamber (a Luminous Stone Talus is here, optional) and look behind the waterfall on the far side for the chest holding the Zora Greaves.

quests.name: The Never-Ending Lecture
quests.giver: Chroma (being lectured by Khira) in the throne room of Zora's Domain (after Sidon of the Zora)
quests.reward: Zora Helm
quests.oneLine: Overhearing a lecture about a lost Zora Helm sends Link to a fish-shaped sky island to recover it.
quests.how: Reach Floating Scales Island in the sky east of the Water Temple (climb Ploymus Mountain and swim up the waterfall in Zora Armor, or fly from a nearby Skyview Tower). Enter the tunnel/grotto on the northeast side of the fish's tail and open the chest inside for the Zora Helm.

quests.name: A Wife Wafted Away
quests.giver: Fronk, near the southwest entrance of Zora's Domain (after Sidon of the Zora)
quests.reward: Hearty Fish Skewer
quests.oneLine: Fronk is worried his wife Mei went off fishing somewhere dangerous and asks Link to find her.
quests.how: Track the quest to Wellspring Island, where Mei is fishing beside a small pool (around 3668, 0567, 1251) — reach it via the waterfall near Shatterback Point or from Igoshon Shrine at the Water Temple. Talk to her to send her home, then return to Fronk in Zora's Domain for the Hearty Fish Skewer.

quests.name: The Moonlit Princess
quests.giver: Seggin, on the bridge leading west out of Zora's Domain (after clean water is restored)
quests.reward: Zora Sword
quests.oneLine: Seggin wants a photo of Mipha's statue holding the Lightscale Trident in the moonlight on a clear night.
quests.how: Sleep at the inn until clear weather and a normal (non-Blood) moon around midnight, then go to Mipha Court and use the Camera to photograph Mipha's statue with the moon behind it — a confirmation mark means it counts. Show the picture to Seggin for the Zora Sword.

quests.name: A Crabulous Deal
quests.giver: Cleff at the General Store in Zora's Domain (after the sludge is cleared)
quests.reward: Sapphire (then repeatable item trades, e.g. Opal, for more crabs)
quests.oneLine: Cleff has become obsessed with Bright-Eyed Crabs and rewards you for bringing him a batch.
quests.how: Collect Bright-Eyed Crabs around Zora's Domain — on the rocks at the base of the support pillars, in the central lower pool, and near the General Store. Photograph one for the Sensor+ to track more, then bring Cleff 10 Bright-Eyed Crabs to receive a Sapphire.

quests.name: Glory of the Zora
quests.giver: Dento, inside the General Store in Zora's Domain (after Sidon of the Zora)
quests.reward: Lightscale Trident (re-craftable)
quests.oneLine: Master craftsman Dento offers to forge the Lightscale Trident if you bring the materials.
quests.how: Gather 1 Zora Spear (chest southwest of Ralis Pond, or dropped by Like Likes), 3 Diamonds, and 5 Flint, then give them all to Dento and he forges the Lightscale Trident. He'll remake it anytime you bring the same materials again.

quests.name: Secret Treasure under the Great Fish
quests.giver: Sidon, atop the highest platform of Zora's Domain next to King Dorephan (after Sidon of the Zora)
quests.location: Zora's Domain / Cave Under Zora's Domain
quests.reward: Vah Ruta Divine Helm
quests.oneLine: Sidon shares a riddle pointing to a hidden treasure beneath two waterfalls under the Domain.
quests.how: From the long bridge out of Zora's Domain, dive into the marked waterfall and dash (A) to enter the Cave Under Zora's Domain — do NOT wear Zora Armor or you'll swim back up the falls. Pass through the second waterfall inside to reach the chest holding the Vah Ruta Divine Helm.

quests.name: The Fort at Ja'Abu Ridge
quests.giver: Gaddison, at the east bridge/entrance of Zora's Domain (after Sidon of the Zora)
quests.location: Ja'Abu Ridge, southeast of Zora's Domain
quests.reward: 100 Rupees
quests.oneLine: Gaddison asks Link to clear the monsters that have seized the fort at Ja'Abu Ridge.
quests.how: Head to Ja'Abu Ridge Fort and snipe the watchtower Bokoblin with a bow before it sounds the horn, then wipe out the rest of the Bokoblins and the Boss Bokoblin. Return to Gaddison on the bridge for 100 Rupees.

quests.name: True Treasure
quests.giver: Kodah, inside the inn in Zora's Domain (after Sidon of the Zora)
quests.reward: Opal x2 (and the cave's Yomizuk blessing shrine becomes reachable)
quests.oneLine: Kodah sends Link to a cave at Tarm Point where a stranded Zora is searching for treasure.
quests.how: Go to the Tarm Point cave and talk to Sasan, who can't swim. Help him raft across the cavern to Finley on the far island — use the rising/falling water level and Ultrahand-built platforms to clear the path so the two reunite, earning Opal x2.

quests.name: The Blue Stone
quests.giver: Ledo, at the end of the walkway at East Reservoir Lake (after Sidon of the Zora)
quests.location: East Reservoir Lake, east of Zora's Domain
quests.reward: Zora Fabric (paraglider fabric)
quests.oneLine: Stonemason Ledo wants a large luminous (blue) stone brought back from a cavern across the reservoir.
quests.how: Build a raft with Ultrahand (a plank, two Fans, and a Steering Stick) and cross to the Reservoir Lakefront Cavern. Ultrahand a large luminous stone onto your raft, ferry it back to Ledo, and he gives you the Zora Fabric (take it to the Kochi Dye Shop in Hateno to restyle your paraglider).

quests.name: An Uninvited Guest
quests.giver: Ami, a child around the side of Wetland Stable
quests.reward: 2 Pony Points
quests.oneLine: A frightened child can't sleep because monsters near the stable are scaring him.
quests.how: Head into the woods behind the stable to the monster camp (a Moblin with Lizalfos). A handy trick is to drop into the stable's well and pop out the nearby South Well right beside the camp for a sneakstrike. Defeat the monsters, then report back to Ami for 2 Pony Points.

quests.name: The Ultimate Dish
quests.giver: Moza, inside the Rikoka Hills Well (southern edge of the Lanayru Wetlands)
quests.reward: Monster Stew (which she keeps upgrading)
quests.oneLine: Moza, obsessed with the 'ultimate dish,' wants you to bring her a failed dish to experiment on.
quests.how: Make a failed dish at any cooking pot — add a mineral for Rock-Hard Food or a monster part for Dubious Food — then bring it down the well to Moza. Pay her a few Rupees and she 'perfects' it into a Monster Stew that restores extra hearts.

quests.name: A Picture for Wetland Stable
quests.giver: Lawdon — interact with the empty picture frame on the wall inside Wetland Stable
quests.reward: 1 Pony Point (plus the standard stable-picture bonus item if it's your last frame)
quests.oneLine: The stable owner wants a photo of the Ring Ruins to hang in his empty frame.
quests.how: Travel toward Kakariko Village and use the Camera to photograph the large ring-shaped Ring Ruins (above Lantern Lake) so the whole ring and its label are in shot. Return and interact with the frame again to show Lawdon the photo for the reward.

quests.name: Goddess Statue of Wisdom
quests.giver: The Goddess Statue at the Spring of Wisdom, atop Mount Lanayru
quests.reward: Sapphire
quests.oneLine: The statue can no longer sense its Mother Goddess Statue and asks Link to investigate, then bring a dragon's claw.
quests.how: With Lv.2 Cold Resistance, climb Mount Lanayru and pray at the statue. First go check the toppled Mother Goddess Statue in the Forgotten Temple and report back; the statue then asks for one of Naydra's Claws. Find the dragon Naydra (around Mount Lanayru / Naydra Snowfield Chasm), shoot a claw off and grab it, then offer it at the spring for a Sapphire.

quests.name: Amber Dealer
quests.giver: Ramella, standing in front of the ore shop in central Goron City
quests.reward: 200 Rupees + she then buys your ore in 10-piece bulk
quests.oneLine: A traveling merchant wants ten pieces of Amber and will start buying your ore in bulk.
quests.how: Mine Amber from the black ore deposits all over Death Mountain and Eldin until you have 10. Talk to Ramella and sell the 10 Amber; she pays 200 Rupees, then afterward buys your other ores ten at a time (she picks which ore, and it changes daily).

quests.name: Simmerstone Springs
quests.giver: Kima, on the raised bridge behind the Goron City inn
quests.reward: Silver Rupee (100)
quests.oneLine: A Goron is hunting for a legendary hot spring and wants you to find it.
quests.how: Talk to Kima, then head into Gorko Tunnel (northwest, behind the city) and follow it to the hidden hot spring inside. Report back to Kima at the bridge to finish; he hands over a Silver Rupee and starts boiling eggs in it.

quests.name: The Ancient City Gorondia
quests.giver: Dugby, across the rail tracks near YunoboCo HQ in Goron City
quests.reward: Zonai Charge + Large Zonai Charge
quests.oneLine: An obsessed Goron historian needs a ride across the broken mine-cart tracks to chase a legend.
quests.how: Grab a nearby mine cart and a Fan with Ultrahand, attach the Fan to the cart and set it on the rails. Ask Dugby to board, then strike/activate the Fan to push the cart across (Part 1). For Part 2, follow Dugby despite his protest, build another fan-cart, clear any rocks blocking the rails with Ultrahand, and ride him to the destination.

quests.name: The Hidden Treasure at Lizard Lakes
quests.giver: Bludo, in the central plaza of Goron City (after Yunobo of Goron City)
quests.location: Goron City / Lizard's Burrow (between the two lizard-shaped lakes)
quests.reward: Vah Rudania Divine Helm
quests.oneLine: Bludo points you to a treasure hidden in a cave between the lizard-shaped lakes.
quests.how: Talk to Bludo, then travel to Lizard's Burrow, the cave set between the two lizard-shaped lakes. Blow up or smash the rubble blocking the entrance (Yunobo's charge or a bomb works), go inside, and open the treasure chest to claim the Vah Rudania Divine Helm (fire resistance).

quests.name: Moon-Gazing Gorons
quests.giver: Tray (with Volcon) near the Goron City inn entrance (after Yunobo of Goron City)
quests.reward: Silver Rupee (100)
quests.oneLine: Gorons want a photo of a mysterious circle of light that only appears at midday in a lakeside cave.
quests.how: Go to Lake Ferona (south of Goron City, by Eldin Canyon Skyview Tower) and enter the cave on the lake's west side. The ring of light only forms around noon, so make a campfire from wood + flint and 'wait until midday', then photograph the circular light with your Camera. Show the picture to Tray and Volcon back in Goron City.

quests.name: Soul of the Gorons
quests.giver: Fugo, in the building north of the Goron City general store (after Yunobo of Goron City)
quests.reward: Boulder Breaker (and he will re-forge it if it breaks)
quests.oneLine: The new smith needs rare materials to forge the legendary Goron weapon, the Boulder Breaker.
quests.how: Bring Fugo 1 Cobble Crusher (chest from Like Likes in Eldin, or held by a Depths shadow soldier), 3 Diamonds (Goron City shop, or rare ore deposits), and 5 Flint (any ore deposit). Hand them over to receive the Boulder Breaker; return to him later to have it re-forged if it breaks.

quests.name: The Abandoned Laborer
quests.giver: Mota, stranded inside the Death Mountain West Tunnel
quests.reward: Large Zonai Charge
quests.oneLine: A worker is trapped on the far side of a broken track inside a scorching tunnel and needs a way out.
quests.how: Wear Fireproof armor or drink a Fireproof Elixir first. Enter the tunnel, glide down to Mota across the broken railing, and clear the rubble hiding the Zonai Rockets (don't use Bomb Flowers in the heat). Ultrahand the Rockets onto a mine cart, have Mota board, strike it to launch him across, and lead him outside.

quests.name: Meat for Meat
quests.giver: Mezer, at the Bedrock Bistro by Goronbi Lake (after the Fire Temple)
quests.reward: Large Zonai Charge
quests.oneLine: The bistro needs a Marbled Rock Roast to cook with and trades you a Zonai charge for one.
quests.how: After the Fire Temple frees the Gorons, visit the Bedrock Bistro and talk to Mezer. Fetch one Marbled Rock Roast from the West or East Restaurant Cave nearby and bring it back to Mezer; he trades you a Large Zonai Charge (and this opens Rock Roast or Dust).

quests.name: Rock Roast or Dust
quests.giver: Cooke, at the Bedrock Bistro counter (after Meat for Meat)
quests.reward: Seared Gourmet Steak
quests.oneLine: The chef needs another Marbled Rock Roast to keep cooking.
quests.how: Talk to Cooke at the counter, then return to one of the Restaurant Caves for a Marbled Rock Roast. The east cave requires riding a mine cart over the lava to reach it. Bring the roast back to Cooke for a Seared Gourmet Steak (he keeps trading one per roast).

quests.name: Cash In on Ripened Flint
quests.giver: Gomo, sitting beside the Bedrock Bistro (after Meat for Meat)
quests.reward: 1,000 Rupees
quests.oneLine: A Goron gambles that if you hand him enough Flint, one piece will be rare 'Ripened Flint'.
quests.how: Talk to Gomo and give him a batch of Flint (he asks for 20, 50, or 100 at once). If any piece in the batch turns out to be Ripened Flint, he pays 1,000 Rupees; otherwise the Flint is consumed, so gather more from ore deposits and try again (50+ at a time improves the odds).

quests.name: Mine-Cart Land: Open For Business!
quests.giver: Bayge, at the Southern Mine (north of Timawak Shrine)
quests.reward: Red Rupee (20)
quests.oneLine: A target-shooting mine-cart minigame: pop the balloons as you ride.
quests.how: Talk to Bayge, put the mine cart on the tracks and ride it; aim your bow and shoot the balloon targets along the route. Hit enough to clear it (a multi-shot or quick-draw bow helps), then collect the Red Rupee.

quests.name: Mine-Cart Land: Quickshot Course
quests.giver: Heehl, at the Southern Mine (unlocks after Open For Business!)
quests.reward: Purple Rupee (50)
quests.oneLine: A faster mine-cart shooting course with more balloons to pop.
quests.how: After clearing Open For Business!, talk to Heehl and ride the faster cart. You have about 80 seconds and need to pop 7 targets. Use a multi-shot or quick-draw bow and lead the balloons; finish to earn a Purple Rupee.

quests.name: Mine-Cart Land: Death Mountain
quests.giver: Kabetta, at the Southern Mine (unlocks after Quickshot Course)
quests.location: Southern Mine / Death Mountain (course above Sitsum Shrine)
quests.reward: Goron Fabric
quests.oneLine: The hardest mine-cart shooting course, looping all the way around Death Mountain.
quests.how: After Quickshot Course, take Kabetta's run; the course is on the west side of Death Mountain (above Sitsum Shrine). The cart moves fast around the mountain and you must pop 8 balloon targets in under two minutes. Clear it to earn Goron Fabric for your paraglider.

quests.name: A Picture for Woodland Stable
quests.giver: Kish, at Woodland Stable (examine the empty picture frame)
quests.reward: 1 Pony Point + Hasty Vegetable Curry
quests.oneLine: The stable wants a photo of a Goron relaxing in a hot spring to fill its display frame.
quests.how: Examine the empty frame so Kish calls you over, then go to the Goron Hot Springs near Goron City and photograph a Goron soaking in the spring with your Camera. Bring the picture back to Kish at Woodland Stable.

quests.name: A Picture for Foothill Stable
quests.giver: Ozunda, at Foothill Stable
quests.reward: 1 Pony Point + Fireproof Elixir
quests.oneLine: The stable wants a photo of the Daruk statue that watches over Goron City.
quests.how: Talk to Ozunda, then travel to Goron City and photograph the large statue of Daruk overlooking the city with your Camera. Return and show Ozunda the picture on your Purah Pad.

quests.name: Hebra's Colossal Fossil
quests.giver: Loone, at the Eldin Great Skeleton (after Eldin's Colossal Fossil)
quests.reward: Purple Rupee (50)
quests.oneLine: Fossil-lover Loone needs the giant skeleton's missing fin bone and spine restored.
quests.how: Talk to Loone, who says the great skeleton is missing its fin bone and a vertebra. Blast the rubble to free the long fin bone and Ultrahand it onto the empty fin socket; melt the ice block freeing the large spine bone and place it into the empty tail slot. Loone rewards you with a Purple Rupee (despite the name, this quest is in Eldin).

quests.name: Misko's Cave of Chests
quests.giver: Domidak & Prissen, outside Cephla Lake Cave
quests.reward: Ember Trousers
quests.oneLine: A cave full of buried chests where only one holds Misko's real treasure.
quests.how: Enter Cephla Lake Cave and dig through the many buried chests; most hold only 1 Rupee, but one contains the Ember Trousers. Grab it to complete the quest (afterward Domidak & Prissen sell you the manuscript clues for 100 Rupees each).

quests.name: Misko's Treasure: Heroines Manuscript
quests.giver: Domidak (buy the manuscript for 100 Rupees outside Cephla Lake Cave)
quests.location: Starts at Cephla Lake Cave (Eldin); treasure in Gerudo Highlands (Statue of the Eighth Heroine)
quests.reward: Tingle's Hood
quests.oneLine: A manuscript clue points to a hidden chest near the Statue of the Eighth Heroine.
quests.how: Buy the Heroines Manuscript from Domidak. Travel to the Statue of the Eighth Heroine at Hemaar's Descent (Gerudo Highlands) and use the Zonai mirrors to reflect sunlight onto the mechanism, opening the cave. Defeat the Gibdos inside, then open the chest in the statue's head for Tingle's Hood.

quests.name: Misko's Treasure: Pirate Manuscript
quests.giver: Domidak (buy the manuscript for 100 Rupees outside Cephla Lake Cave)
quests.location: Starts at Cephla Lake Cave (Eldin); treasure at Cape Cales Cliffbase Cave (Necluda coast)
quests.reward: Tingle's Tights
quests.oneLine: A bought manuscript clue leads to a hidden chest holding a piece of Tingle's outfit.
quests.how: Buy the Pirate Manuscript from Domidak and follow its clue to Cape Cales Cliffbase Cave on the southeast coast. Clear the obstacles inside and open the chest to claim Tingle's Tights.

quests.name: Misko's Treasure: Twins Manuscript
quests.giver: Domidak (buy the manuscript for 100 Rupees outside Cephla Lake Cave)
quests.location: Starts at Cephla Lake Cave (Eldin); treasure in a cave per the manuscript clue
quests.reward: Tingle's Shirt
quests.oneLine: A third bought manuscript clue leads to a hidden chest with another piece of Tingle's outfit.
quests.how: Buy the Twins Manuscript from Domidak and follow its riddle to the indicated cave, deal with the enemies/puzzle inside, and open the chest to claim Tingle's Shirt (completing the Tingle set across the three manuscripts).

quests.name: Misko's Treasure: The Fierce Deity
quests.giver: Misko's message bottle, found at Cephla Lake Cave (after Misko's Cave of Chests)
quests.location: Starts at Cephla Lake Cave (Eldin); armor pieces across Akkala & Hyrule Field
quests.reward: Complete Fierce Deity armor set + Fierce Deity Sword
quests.oneLine: A message sends you to collect the three Fierce Deity armor pieces, which unlock the legendary sword.
quests.how: Examine Misko's message bottle at Cephla Lake Cave to start the quest. Collect the Fierce Deity Armor (Akkala Citadel Ruins hidden cave), Fierce Deity Mask (Skull Lake Cave, Deep Akkala), and Fierce Deity Boots (Ancient Tree Stump Cave near Mount Daphnes, Hyrule Field). Return to Cephla Lake Cave wearing the full set; the hidden path opens to reveal the Fierce Deity Sword.

quests.name: Misko's Treasure of Awakening
quests.giver: Misko's stone-slab message, revealed in Goronbi River Cave
quests.location: Starts at Goronbi River Cave (Eldin); treasure at the Ancient Columns (Tabantha Frontier)
quests.reward: Tunic of Awakening (the quest continues to the rest of the Awakening set)
quests.oneLine: A riddle on a stone slab sends you to ruined columns on the Tabantha Frontier for hidden armor.
quests.how: Grab the Ember Shirt from the chest in Goronbi River Cave (southwest of Goron City) to reveal the hidden stone slab and read Misko's message, starting the quest. Solve the riddle by going to the Ancient Columns in Tabantha Frontier (Rayne Highlands area), open the Ancient Columns Cave, and open the chest for the Tunic of Awakening.

quests.name: Bring Peace to Eldin!
quests.giver: Toren and the Monster-Control Crew, at the campfire between Lake Darman and Death Caldera
quests.reward: 100 Rupees + monster-part drops (and starts Bring Peace to Akkala!)
quests.oneLine: Help the Monster-Control Crew clear out a monster den in Eldin.
quests.how: Talk to Toren at the Eldin campfire, then follow the crew to the Lake Darman Monster Den. Go inside and wipe out every monster alongside the crew. Speak to Toren afterward for 100 Rupees (plus enemy drops); he then heads to Akkala, beginning Bring Peace to Akkala!

quests.name: Mattison's Independence
quests.giver: Hudson & Rhondson, in their house behind the Goddess Statue in Tarrey Town
quests.reward: 200 Rupees (and unlocks the Home on Arrange + A Monstrous Collection quests, plus buying Link's House land)
quests.oneLine: Help Hudson and Rhondson's Gerudo daughter Mattison prepare to leave for Gerudo Town on her coming-of-age journey.
quests.how: Talk to Hudson outside, then find Mattison upstairs and answer her Gerudo-language quiz ('Vaba'). Follow her to the construction site, throw a Puffshroom (from the Depths) to blind the worker watching the railcar so Mattison can slip aboard, then gather and hand 10 Sundelions (from the Sky Islands) to Hudson to send her off.

quests.name: A Monstrous Collection
quests.giver: Kilton, on the north edge of Tarrey Town (appears after Mattison's Independence)
quests.location: Tarrey Town, Akkala (sculptures scattered across Hyrule)
quests.reward: Across the five parts: Monster Extract, Sneaky Monster Soup, Monster Bridle, Monster Saddle, and a Diamond
quests.oneLine: A five-part hunt (I-V) for Kilton's hidden monster sculptures (Bokoblin, Horriblin, Battle Talus, Frox, King Gleeok).
quests.how: Kilton marks each sculpture's rough area; track down all five hidden monster statues in order and report back at each stage for that part's prize. Use the camera/Sensor and climb or Ascend to reach high or buried ones (the King Gleeok statue is the hardest to find).

quests.name: Bring Peace to Akkala!
quests.giver: Toren and his Monster-Control Crew, near Akkala Span (east of Cephla Lake)
quests.reward: Silver Rupee (100 Rupees)
quests.oneLine: Join the Monster-Control Crew to clear the monster horde infesting Akkala Span bridge.
quests.how: Talk to Toren by the span, then fight alongside his squad to wipe out every monster on the bridge. Pick enemies off with a bow from range so big foes can't knock you off the edge, then report to Toren. (Unlocks only after Bring Peace to Eldin!)

quests.name: Robbie's Research
quests.giver: Robbie, inside the Akkala Ancient Tech Lab in northeast Akkala
quests.location: Akkala Ancient Tech Lab, North Akkala
quests.reward: The Sensor+ upgrade (marks materials/enemies on the map)
quests.oneLine: Robbie wants combat data on the Zonai Constructs and asks for Ancient Gear from them.
quests.how: Talk to Robbie at the Akkala Ancient Tech Lab, then hunt Constructs (in the Eldin region or on the Sky Islands) and Fuse/collect their Ancient parts. Bring the requested Construct materials back to Robbie to unlock the Sensor+.

quests.name: Little Sister's Meal Prep
quests.giver: Kleea, a young Gerudo girl inside the Hudson Construction house in Tarrey Town (daytime)
quests.reward: A cooked dish (and a small amount of Rupees)
quests.oneLine: A little girl in Tarrey Town wants to cook a meal for her family and needs ingredients gathered.
quests.how: Find Kleea in the Tarrey Town house during the day and note the ingredients she asks for (Hylian Tomato, Rock Salt, raw meat, etc.). Gather or buy the items, hand them over, and she cooks the dish for you.

quests.name: Home on Arrange
quests.giver: Rhondson, in Tarrey Town (after completing Mattison's Independence)
quests.location: Tarrey Town, Akkala (build plot near Rasitakiwak Shrine)
quests.reward: Hudson Construction Fabric (paraglider fabric)
quests.oneLine: Buy and build your own customizable house, Link's House, on the plot of land near Tarrey Town.
quests.how: Talk to Rhondson to buy the discounted plot (1,500 Rupees) by Rasitakiwak Shrine. Use Ultrahand to set the two free starter rooms inside the roped-off foundation and fuse them together; Rhondson then awards the Hudson Construction Fabric.

quests.name: Secrets Within
quests.giver: Pulcho, by a Zonai device dispenser on the shoreline west of Tarrey Town (below Ulri Mountain Skyview Tower / the Hudson Construction Site)
quests.reward: Sundelion
quests.oneLine: A worker is curious what's really inside the Zonai device dispenser.
quests.how: Talk to Pulcho, then feed the dispenser a Zonai Charge (from the Materials menu) so it spits out devices. Show Pulcho the result and he hands over a Sundelion (and reveals two more dispenser locations).

quests.name: Master the Vehicle Prototype
quests.giver: Fernison, at the Hudson Construction Site west of Tarrey Town
quests.reward: Silver Rupee (100 Rupees) and a Sleepover Ticket (unlocks The Tarrey Town Race is On!)
quests.oneLine: Test-drive a prototype Zonai vehicle through a timed light-gate course.
quests.how: Talk to Fernison, then Ultrahand-attach the provided Steering Stick to the prototype car. Drive through all the light gates within the time limit without letting go of the stick (releasing it fails the run).

quests.name: The Tarrey Town Race is On!
quests.giver: Fernison, at the Hudson Construction Site (after Master the Vehicle Prototype)
quests.reward: 3 Zonai Charges (unlocks the repeatable Beginner/Expert race courses)
quests.oneLine: Build your own Zonai vehicle and beat the construction-site race course against the clock.
quests.how: Use Ultrahand to assemble a car from the parts on the table - attach the prepared Steering Stick, then pick wheels (small = faster but twitchy; big = slower but stable; a mix balances it). Finish the full course within the 2:00 limit to win.

quests.name: Strongest in the World
quests.giver: Chabi, behind East Akkala Stable
quests.reward: Rupees scaling with the horn's tier (up to a Gold Rupee, 300, for a Silver/White-Maned Lynel horn)
quests.oneLine: A Goron smith wants to see the world's strongest weapon - bring a weapon fused with a Lynel Horn.
quests.how: Hunt a Lynel (nearest is in North Akkala Valley, west of the stable) for its horn, then Fuse the Lynel Horn onto a weapon. Show the fused weapon to Chabi; the better the horn, the bigger the rupee reward.

quests.name: The Gathering Pirates
quests.giver: Aya, holding a broom near East Akkala Stable (after starting a Regional Phenomena)
quests.location: East Akkala Stable / North Akkala Beach, Akkala
quests.reward: 2 Pony Points and an Endura Carrot (plus a Blue Hinox Hammer in the unlocked chest)
quests.oneLine: Investigate the monster ships menacing the stable off North Akkala Beach.
quests.how: Talk to Aya, then head to the three pirate ships off North Akkala Beach. Paraglide down onto a crow's nest for a safe vantage and pick off the Moblins, Bokoblins and Aerocudas with arrows; clearing them unlocks a chest (Blue Hinox Hammer). Report back to Aya.

quests.name: Eldin's Colossal Fossil
quests.giver: Loone, just outside East Akkala Stable (on the path toward the Tech Lab)
quests.location: East Akkala Stable, Akkala (fossil in northern Eldin)
quests.reward: Purple Rupee (50 Rupees)
quests.oneLine: Help fossil-fan Loone restore the missing 'eye' of the Eldin Great Skeleton.
quests.how: Talk to Loone and pick the 'Ancient things?' option to mark the fossil (in the East Deplian Badlands by Mayak Shrine, north of Death Mountain). Break the rocks around the spherical 'eye' stone, then Ultrahand it into the carved socket on the skeleton's head and rotate it to seat it. Report to Loone.

quests.name: Goddess Statue of Power
quests.giver: Goddess Statue at the Spring of Power, northeast Akkala (northwest of Sinatanika Shrine)
quests.reward: Ruby
quests.oneLine: The Spring of Power's Goddess Statue asks for an offering of Dinraal's claw.
quests.how: Speak to the statue to learn it wants Dinraal's Claw. Find the dragon Dinraal circling the Eldin region (around Death Mountain), shoot one of its claws to collect the material, then drop it in the Spring of Power's water; the statue rewards you with a Ruby.

quests.name: One-Hit Wonder!
quests.giver: Parcy, at South Akkala Stable
quests.reward: Keep the gems that drop (Ruby, Sapphire, Topaz)
quests.oneLine: A woman challenges you to smash a stubborn rare ore deposit in a single hit.
quests.how: Talk to Parcy, then break the Rare Ore Deposit in one strike using a blunt/Demolisher weapon (e.g. a Boulder Breaker or a hammer) or a Fused Bomb Flower. Collect the gems that burst out as your reward.

quests.name: A Picture for South Akkala Stable
quests.giver: Dmitri, by the empty frame inside South Akkala Stable (needs the Camera + one Regional Phenomena)
quests.reward: 1 Pony Point and a Prime Meat Stew
quests.oneLine: The stable owner wants a painting of Tarrey Town's Unity Bell for his empty frame.
quests.how: Examine the empty frame to start, then go to Tarrey Town and photograph the Unity Bell above the central Goddess Statue with the Camera. Return and show Dmitri the picture.

quests.name: A Picture for East Akkala Stable
quests.giver: Rudi, by the empty frame inside East Akkala Stable (needs the Camera + one Regional Phenomena)
quests.location: East Akkala Stable, Akkala (subject at Octorok Lake)
quests.reward: 1 Pony Point and a Meat and Rice Bowl
quests.oneLine: The stable owner wants a photo of Octorok Lake when it takes its octorok shape.
quests.how: Examine the empty frame to start, then go to Octorok Lake (southwest of the stable) during rain - the risen water makes the lake look like an octorok. Photograph it from a high vantage (a hill to the north, or a Zonai balloon) so the caption reads 'Octorok-shaped Octorok Lake', then show Rudi.

quests.name: The Lomei Labyrinth Island Prophecy
quests.giver: Zonai terminal/prophecy inside Lomei Labyrinth Island, far northeast in the Akkala Sea
quests.reward: Evil Spirit Armor (full set across the linked labyrinths)
quests.oneLine: Solve the three linked Lomei labyrinths (surface, sky, and Depths) to claim the Evil Spirit Armor set.
quests.how: Navigate the surface maze to its center and the Igashuk Shrine, read the labyrinth terminal to start the prophecy, then follow it down to the matching labyrinth in the Depths (toss Brightbloom Seeds for light). Defeat the Flux Construct III there - Ultrahand-yank its glowing weak cube and strike it - then claim the armor from the chamber that rises.

quests.name: Molli the Fletcher's Quest
quests.giver: Molli, in Rito Village
quests.reward: Arrow x10
quests.oneLine: A young Rito fletcher wants a piece of fruit and trades you arrows for it.
quests.how: Listen to the children finish the Song of the Stormwind Ark, follow Molli home and talk to her. Hand her one Ice Fruit (grows on bushes in the snowy Hebra/Tabantha hills) or one White Chuchu Jelly and she gives you 10 arrows.

quests.name: Genli's Home Cooking
quests.giver: Genli, at the merchant's shop in Rito Village (after the Tulin of Rito Village main quest)
quests.reward: Biting Simmered Fruit (a cooked dish)
quests.oneLine: A Rito cook wants a specific fish to perfect her new recipe.
quests.how: Talk to Genli, who asks for one Staminoka Bass. Catch one in the ponds on the islands near Rito Village (cross the bridge and look in the pond), then hand it over for the dish.

quests.name: Fish for Fletching
quests.giver: Bedoli, in Rito Village (after the Tulin of Rito Village main quest)
quests.reward: Arrow x10 (and unlocks ongoing arrow trades)
quests.oneLine: A worried Rito needs cave fish to get through the food shortage.
quests.how: Speak to Bedoli, who asks for 3 Glowing Cave Fish. Find them swimming in any cave or well with standing water (use a Brightbloom Seed for light), then deliver all three to get 10 arrows.

quests.name: Legacy of the Rito
quests.giver: Teba, at his house at the top of Rito Village (after the Tulin of Rito Village main quest)
quests.reward: Great Eagle Bow
quests.oneLine: Teba wants to recreate the legendary Rito bow and needs materials and a base bow.
quests.how: Bring Teba a Swallow Bow (grab one from the hut near the Flight Range / Dronoc's Pass north of the village), 5 bundles of Wood (chop trees, then hit the fallen logs), and 3 Diamonds (mine ore deposits or buy at Goron City). Hand them over for the Great Eagle Bow.

quests.name: The Rito Rope Bridge
quests.giver: Gesane (with Juannelle), beside the broken bridge at the entrance to Rito Village (after clearing the Wind Temple)
quests.reward: 100 Rupees (Silver Rupee)
quests.oneLine: The bridge into Rito Village is broken and needs a carpenter and lumber to repair.
quests.how: Talk to Gesane and Juannelle, then go to Lookout Landing and tell the carpenter Karson (the name ends in '-son') about the Rito Rope Bridge. Meet him at the ruined bridge with 20 Wood; he rebuilds it, then report back to Gesane.

quests.name: Kaneli's Flight Training
quests.giver: Kaneli, at the Flight Range southwest of Rito Village (after Tulin of Rito Village)
quests.reward: 50 Rupees (Purple Rupee); unlocks the advanced flight course
quests.oneLine: A timed paragliding challenge to fly through rings at the Flight Range.
quests.how: Talk to Kaneli, then dive off the range and open your paraglider to pass through at least 15 of the 20 rings within the 30-second limit, tilting to line up the rings. Clearing it earns the rupees and opens the harder advanced course.

quests.name: Treasure of the Secret Springs
quests.giver: Tulin, in Rito Village (after the Tulin of Rito Village main quest)
quests.location: North Biron Snowshelf Cave, Hebra Mountains
quests.reward: Vah Medoh Divine Helm (armor)
quests.oneLine: Tulin shares an old Rito legend of treasure hidden where three springs meet.
quests.how: Go to North Biron Snowshelf Cave at the center of the three Secret Hot Springs (Sturnida, Goflam, Sherfin) and melt the ice to get in. Inside the tall room, smash the three correct cracked spring walls to flood it; the rising water moves the owl statue aside and reveals the chest with the helm.

quests.name: Crossing the Cold Pool
quests.giver: Verla, at the entrance of Talonto Peak Cave, Hebra Mountains
quests.reward: 50 Rupees (Purple Rupee)
quests.oneLine: A Rito needs chillshrooms that are stranded across a freezing pool inside a cave.
quests.how: Verla asks for 10 Chillshrooms growing across a cold-water pool. Grab the wooden planks near Verla, use Ultrahand to build a raft or bridge, and float across to pick the chillshrooms (don't swim the icy water), then hand him 10.

quests.name: Cave Mushrooms That Glow
quests.giver: Nat (with Meghyn), outside Brightcap Cave, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: Spicy Tomato Mushroom Stew (a cooked dish)
quests.oneLine: Two traveling sisters are collecting the glowing mushrooms found in caves.
quests.how: Talk to Nat and Meghyn, then gather 10 Brightcaps, the glowing mushrooms that grow on the walls and floor inside Brightcap Cave (and similar caves). Hand Nat 10 Brightcaps for the dish.

quests.name: Open the Door
quests.giver: Jogo and Yammo (heard from inside a cabin), Tabantha Village Ruins, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: Spicy Elixir; unlocks shield-surfing lessons
quests.oneLine: Two villagers refuse to open their door until the monsters outside are gone.
quests.how: Approach the cabin with smoke from its chimney; the pair won't open up while monsters are near. Defeat the Bokoblins camped beside the house, then knock again. Yammo opens the door, gives you a Spicy Elixir, and teaches you to shield surf.

quests.name: Supply-Eyeing Fliers
quests.giver: Huck, guarding supplies on a hill in the Tabantha Frontier (near Tabantha Village Ruins)
quests.reward: 50 Rupees (Purple Rupee)
quests.oneLine: Aerocudas are circling overhead, eyeing a Rito's stockpile of supplies.
quests.how: Three Aerocudas hover above. Shoot each one out of the sky with arrows (fuse a Keese Eyeball for homing if you struggle to hit them). Bring down all three to finish.

quests.name: The Blocked Cave
quests.giver: Mazli, at a cave entrance near Rospro Pass, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: 20 Rupees (Red Rupee)
quests.oneLine: Rockfall has sealed a supply cave that a Rito needs reopened.
quests.how: Talk to Mazli, then clear the rock blockage sealing the cave, smash it with a hammer or a rock/Bomb Flower-fused weapon or arrow. Once it's cleared, speak to Mazli for the reward.

quests.name: A Picture for Tabantha Bridge Stable
quests.giver: Dabi, via the empty picture frame at Tabantha Bridge Stable, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: Pony Point + Hasty Elixir
quests.oneLine: The stable wants a scenic photo for its empty wall frame.
quests.how: Examine the empty frame to get the request, then go to the Ancient Columns (west, by Tanagar Canyon) and photograph them at sunrise (sleep at a fire to set the time). Return and interact with the frame to give Dabi the picture.

quests.name: A Picture for Snowfield Stable
quests.giver: Varke, via the empty picture frame at Snowfield Stable, Hebra Mountains
quests.reward: Pony Point + Spicy Meat Stew
quests.oneLine: The stable wants a photo of the giant bird shape seen in the Hebra sky.
quests.how: Examine the empty frame to get the request for the 'giant bird with wings stretched wide.' From the cedar tree on Talonto Peak, aim the camera at the bird-shaped Biron Snowshelf illusion until the screen flags it, snap the photo, then return and use the frame to hand Varke the picture.

quests.name: The Captured Tent
quests.giver: Nat (with Meghyn), at Snowfield Stable, Hebra Mountains
quests.reward: Spicy Steamed Mushroom (a cooked dish)
quests.oneLine: Monsters chased the sisters out of the cave camp they had set up near the stable.
quests.how: Talk to Nat and Meghyn, then head to Mount Drena Foothill Cave. Defeat all the monsters inside, several Bokoblins and a Moblin gathered around the fire, to reclaim the camp and finish.

quests.name: Who Finds the Haven
quests.giver: Nat (with Meghyn), at Snowfield Stable, Hebra Mountains (after The Captured Tent)
quests.reward: None (keep the mushrooms in the haven)
quests.oneLine: The sisters search for a rumored hidden 'haven' full of mushrooms.
quests.how: After The Captured Tent, talk to the sisters again, then travel to Sturnida Springs Cave (near Rospro Pass Skyview Tower). Crawl through the small tunnel to the end to discover the glowing hidden room packed with mushrooms; reaching it completes the quest.

quests.name: The Duchess Who Disappeared
quests.giver: Russ, at Selmie's Spot, Hebra Mountains (after Tulin of Rito Village)
quests.location: Hebra Mountains (Selmie's Spot / East Biron Snowshelf Cave)
quests.reward: Strong Zonaite Shield; unlocks Selmie's shield-surf lessons
quests.oneLine: The famous shield-surf teacher Selmie has vanished and her partner Russ is worried.
quests.how: Talk to Russ, then find Fin by the fire near the Hebra tundra to learn she's in East Biron Snowshelf Cave. Inside, smash the rock walls to find Selmie at a campfire and clear her exit, then fast-travel back to Selmie's Spot and talk to her to get the shield.

quests.name: The North Lomei Prophecy
quests.giver: A mysterious owl's voice at the terminal in North Lomei Labyrinth, Tabantha Snowfield
quests.location: North Lomei Labyrinth (Tabantha Snowfield: surface + sky + Depths)
quests.reward: Evil Spirit Greaves (armor)
quests.oneLine: An owl's prophecy challenges you to conquer all three layers of the northern labyrinth.
quests.how: Reach the terminal at the heart of the surface maze (near Mayaotaki Shrine) to start it. Activate the ring at the maze center, then in the sky-island maze light the four ring terminals (and a fifth on top), then dive straight down through the sky and surface mazes into the Depths labyrinth and beat the Flux Construct III for the greaves.

quests.name: Hebra's Colossal Fossil
quests.giver: Loone, by the campfire at the Hebra Great Skeleton, Hebra Mountains (after Eldin's Colossal Fossil)
quests.reward: 50 Rupees (Purple Rupee)
quests.oneLine: Fossil-hunter Loone needs help restoring the giant skeleton's missing bones.
quests.how: Loone says the skeleton is missing its fin bone and a vertebra. Free the fin bone from the rubble nearby and melt the giant ice block to free the spine, then use Ultrahand to lift each bone back into its slot on the skeleton and report to Loone.

quests.name: The Hornist's Dramatic Escape
quests.giver: Eustus, stuck in a hole near Piper Ridge, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: Courser Bee Honey x3 (and leads into Serenade to Mija)
quests.oneLine: A horn player from a traveling music troupe has fallen into a pit and can't climb out.
quests.how: Find Eustus calling from the hole near Piper Ridge. His wagon is stuck down there too, so use Ultrahand (plus a balloon or fan) to turn the wagon into a lift/flying machine, get him in, and float him out. Rescuing him gives the honey and points you to troupe leader Mastro at Snowfield Stable.

quests.name: Serenade to Mija
quests.giver: Mastro, the troupe leader at Snowfield Stable, Hebra Mountains (after The Hornist's Dramatic Escape and Serenade to a Great Fairy)
quests.location: Snowfield Stable / Great Fairy Mija's Fountain (Hebra Mountains)
quests.reward: 100 Rupees; unlocks Great Fairy Mija's Fountain (armor upgrades)
quests.oneLine: Help the musical troupe reunite and play to awaken the Great Fairy Mija.
quests.how: After rescuing Eustus, talk to Mastro at Snowfield Stable, then escort/lead the Stable Trotters to Mija's nearby fountain (defeat any ambushers and clear the path). Their performance wakes Mija, opening the fountain for armor upgrades, and Mastro pays you 100 rupees.

quests.name: Zelda's Golden Horse
quests.giver: Harlow, at Snowfield Stable, Hebra Mountains (after starting Potential Princess Sightings with Penn)
quests.reward: The Golden Horse + Royal Saddle + Royal Bridle + an Energizing Elixir + rupees
quests.oneLine: Track down and tame the legendary golden horse Princess Zelda once rode.
quests.how: Talk to Harlow (with Penn) at Snowfield Stable, then head north into the North Tabantha Snowfield where the golden horse roams. Sneak up behind it, mount it, and rapidly press the soothe button to hold on until it calms; ride it back to Harlow to register it and claim the royal gear.

quests.name: Bring Peace to Hebra!
quests.giver: Flaxel, at the Monster-Control Crew camp in the South Tabantha Snowfield (after Bring Peace to Faron!)
quests.reward: Rupees (and, as the final Bring-Peace quest, the Monster Control Crew Fabric)
quests.oneLine: The Monster-Control Crew needs help clearing a monster stronghold in the snowfield.
quests.how: Talk to Flaxel near the snowfield enemy base, then wipe out the monsters holding the stronghold, including a Boss Bokoblin (use Ultrahand to clear any spike-ball blocking the way in). Clearing them out completes the quest.

quests.name: Molli the Fletcher's Quest
quests.giver: Molli, a young Rito on a platform near the main staircase / in her home in Rito Village
quests.reward: 10 Arrows (repeatable)
quests.oneLine: A little Rito fletcher wants a cold ingredient to keep working, in exchange for arrows.
quests.how: Listen to Molli's song, then find her at her home in Rito Village and hand over an Ice Fruit (a White Chuchu Jelly also works). Ice Fruit grows on the cold mountains/caves around the village. She gives 10 arrows, and you can keep trading for more.

quests.name: Genli's Home Cooking
quests.giver: Genli, a small Rito child in the Rito Village general store
quests.reward: Biting Simmered Fruit (a cold-resist dish)
quests.oneLine: A young Rito in the shop wants a Staminoka Bass to cook with.
quests.how: Talk to Genli, then catch a Staminoka Bass in the pond just east of Rito Village (sneak up and grab it, or stun it with an arrow / a thrown weapon, then collect it). Bring the fish back to Genli to receive a Biting Simmered Fruit.

quests.name: Fish for Fletching
quests.giver: Bedoli, a female Rito by the crates on the southwest plateau of Rito Village (after Tulin of Rito Village)
quests.reward: 10 Arrows (repeatable)
quests.oneLine: A Rito needs glowing cave fish to make fletching for arrows.
quests.how: After finishing the Tulin of Rito Village main quest, speak to Bedoli, then head to West Totori Cave (just southeast of the village) and catch three Glowing Cave Fish. Sneak up and grab them or shoot them with a plain arrow (don't fuse a Bomb Flower, or you'll cook them). Hand the three fish to Bedoli for 10 arrows.

quests.name: Legacy of the Rito
quests.giver: Teba, at his house at the top of Rito Village (after Tulin of Rito Village / the Wind Temple)
quests.reward: Great Eagle Bow (28x3 damage, fires 3 arrows at once)
quests.oneLine: Teba will forge Link a Great Eagle Bow if you supply the materials.
quests.how: After the Wind Temple, talk to Teba and bring him a Swallow Bow, 5 bundles of Wood (chop trees and hit the fallen logs), and 3 Diamonds (mine glittering Rare Ore Deposits in caves or the Depths). Hand them over and Teba crafts the Great Eagle Bow.

quests.name: Treasure of the Secret Springs
quests.giver: Tulin, in Rito Village (after Tulin of Rito Village)
quests.location: Rito Village / Hebra Mountains, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: Vah Medoh Divine Helm (armor, cold resistance)
quests.oneLine: Solve the riddle about three secret hot springs to wake a sleeping treasure.
quests.how: The riddle points to the spot at the center of Sturnida, Goflam's, and Sherfin's Secret Hot Springs: North Biron Snowshelf Cave in the Hebra mountains. Melt the big ice block at the entrance with a fire weapon/Fire Fruit, then inside break the three cracked walls so each hot spring floods the chamber and raises the water; an owl statue shifts aside, revealing a chest with the Vah Medoh Divine Helm.

quests.name: The Rito Rope Bridge
quests.giver: Gesane (with Juannelle) at the Rito Village entrance after Tulin of Rito Village
quests.location: Rito Village & Tabantha Bridge, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: Silver Rupee (100 Rupees), plus the repaired bridge to Rito Village
quests.oneLine: Help the Rito and a Hudson Construction carpenter rebuild the storm-damaged rope bridge to the village.
quests.how: Talk to Gesane and Juannelle, then travel to Lookout Landing and recruit the carpenter Karson (Hudson Construction). He returns and asks for 20 bundles of Wood — chop down trees and slice the fallen logs to gather it. Deliver the 20 Wood to Karson and he and Gesane repair the Rito Rope Bridge; Gesane pays you a Silver Rupee.

quests.name: Crossing the Cold Pool
quests.giver: Verla, inside Talonto Peak Cave
quests.location: Talonto Peak, north of Rito Village, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: 50 Rupees
quests.oneLine: A traveler is stranded by a freezing pond and needs Chillshrooms from the far side.
quests.how: Verla wants 10 Chillshrooms, but they sit across a frigid pool. Use Ultrahand to join the loose wooden planks just outside the cave into a long bridge/raft, lay it on the water, cross to the far side, and gather 10 Chillshrooms. Bring them back to Verla for 50 Rupees.

quests.name: Cave Mushrooms That Glow
quests.giver: Meghyn and Nat (two sisters) at the entrance of Brightcap Cave
quests.reward: Spicy Tomato Mushroom Stew (a cold-resist dish)
quests.oneLine: Two sisters ask for ten glowing cave mushrooms.
quests.how: Enter Brightcap Cave and collect 10 Brightcaps — the glowing mushrooms cling to the walls and floor throughout the cave. Return the 10 Brightcaps to Meghyn and Nat at the entrance to receive the Spicy Tomato Mushroom Stew dish.

quests.name: The Blocked Cave
quests.giver: Mazli, outside Rospro Pass Cave
quests.location: Rospro Pass, northeast of Rito Village, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: Red Rupee (20 Rupees)
quests.oneLine: A Rito wants the boulders sealing a cave entrance cleared away.
quests.how: The entrance to Rospro Pass Cave is blocked by rocks. Break them with a Bomb Flower-fused arrow or a Rock/heavy-fused (hammer-type) melee weapon — there are two blockages, so it takes a couple of hits. Once the cave is open, talk to Mazli for a Red Rupee.

quests.name: Kaneli's Flight Training
quests.giver: Kaneli, in the hut at the Flight Range (northwest of Rito Village)
quests.location: Flight Range, north of Rito Village, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: Purple Rupee (50 Rupees); unlocks an Advanced Course
quests.oneLine: The former elder Kaneli runs a paraglider ring-flying course.
quests.how: Talk to Kaneli to start the course, then paraglide through at least 15 rings within the time limit, staying inside the range. Pump the paraglider open to rise and close it to dive so you swoop through each ring; clearing 15 finishes the test for a Purple Rupee (and an optional Advanced Course).

quests.name: Open the Door
quests.giver: Jogo and Yammo, hiding in a house in the Tabantha Village Ruins
quests.reward: Spicy Elixir; they teach Link shield surfing
quests.oneLine: Two travelers won't leave their house until the monsters camped outside are gone.
quests.how: The pair refuse to open up because Bokoblins are camped right outside. Clear out the three Bokoblins in the area (sneakstrikes or fused weapons make quick work of them), then talk to them again — Jogo and Yammo come out, give a Spicy Elixir, and show you how to shield surf.

quests.name: Supply-Eyeing Fliers
quests.giver: Huck, a Rito guarding crates in the Tabantha Village Ruins / Tabantha Hills
quests.reward: Purple Rupee (50 Rupees)
quests.oneLine: A Rito is pinned guarding supplies from three circling Aerocudas.
quests.how: Three Aerocudas are circling Huck's supplies. Shoot all three down — fusing an eyeball (Keese/Aerocuda) to your arrows makes them home in, or toss a Hylian Pine Cone into the nearby campfire to make an updraft, ride it up with your paraglider, and pick them off with your bow. Talk to Huck after the third falls for a Purple Rupee.

quests.name: The Mother Goddess Statue
quests.giver: The Mother Goddess Statue at the Forgotten Temple (by Mayausiy Shrine, Tanagar Canyon)
quests.location: Forgotten Temple, Tanagar Canyon, Tabantha Frontier
quests.reward: White Sword of the Sky
quests.oneLine: Awaken the toppled Mother Goddess Statue by feeding the three smaller statues Dragon Claws.
quests.how: Visit the Mother Goddess Statue first, then complete the three regional Goddess Statue quests — each small statue (Courage/Power/Wisdom) asks for a Dragon Claw, shot off Dinraal, Naydra, or Farosh while gliding near them. With all three claws delivered, return to the Mother Goddess Statue in the Forgotten Temple for the White Sword of the Sky.

quests.name: The Hornist's Dramatic Escape
quests.giver: Eustus, a horn-playing musician fallen into a hole near Piper Ridge (road toward Rito Village)
quests.reward: Courser Bee Honey x3
quests.oneLine: A wandering musician and his cart are stuck at the bottom of a pit.
quests.how: Eustus and his wagon have fallen into a hole. Use Ultrahand to build a flying rig: attach two Flame Emitters to the cart, put two Hot-Air Balloons above them so the heat lifts the cart, and add a Fan on the back. Climb aboard and hit the fan — the balloons float it up while the fan pushes it forward out of the pit. Eustus rewards you with 3 Courser Bee Honey.

quests.name: Horse-Drawn Dreams
quests.giver: Zumi, beside her broken wagon outside New Serenne Stable
quests.reward: 100 rupees (Silver Rupee)
quests.oneLine: Repair a wagon-dreamer's broken cart and bring her a tamed horse so she can finally take to the road.
quests.how: Talk to Zumi, then use Ultrahand to reattach the two wheels (leaning on the nearby boxes) and the wooden bucket to her broken wagon. Then cross the road and climb the hill, crouch to sneak up on a wild horse, mount and soothe it to tame it, and ride it back to Zumi to hand it over.

quests.name: The Horse Guard's Request
quests.giver: Toffa, near the horses at Outskirt Stable
quests.reward: 150 rupees total (50 + 100) and 2 Pony Points (one per animal)
quests.oneLine: A horse-loving stable hand wants to see a skeleton horse, then a tamed wild forest animal.
quests.how: First wait until night (sleep in a bed or sit at a fire), go north to the Sanidin Park Ruins, sneak up on a Stalhorse (skeleton horse), mount it and ride it back to Toffa before daybreak (it crumbles in daylight). Then catch a non-horse forest animal such as a deer in the woods near the stable by crouching to sneak up, mounting and soothing it, and bring it back to Toffa.

quests.name: Where Are the Wells?
quests.giver: Fera, found down inside the Tabantha Bridge Stable Well
quests.location: Tabantha Bridge Stable Well, Hyrule Ridge
quests.reward: 10 rupees per new well reported (580 for all 58); finding all wells earns the 'All's Well' key item
quests.oneLine: A well enthusiast wants every well in Hyrule located, paying you per discovery.
quests.how: Drop into the Tabantha Bridge Stable Well and talk to Fera; she then relocates to the Lookout Landing Well. As you climb down into wells across Hyrule (most are near stables, towns and old ruins), return to Fera at Lookout Landing to report them — she pays 10 rupees each and tells you how many remain. Find all 58 to fully complete it.

quests.name: A Picture for Tabantha Bridge Stable
quests.giver: Dabi at Tabantha Bridge Stable (examine the empty picture frame to summon him)
quests.reward: 1 Pony Point and a Hasty Elixir
quests.oneLine: An artist wants a photo of the Ancient Columns at sunrise to fill an empty frame, but monsters scare him off.
quests.how: Check the empty picture frame at the stable to start, then cross the Tabantha Great Bridge to the Ancient Columns and use the Camera (Purah Pad) between 4am and 6am to photograph them at sunrise (sleep or wait at a fire to reach dawn). Return and show the picture to Dabi, who paints a copy for the frame.

quests.name: A Picture for Outskirt Stable
quests.giver: Embry at Outskirt Stable (examine the empty picture frame to start)
quests.reward: 1 Pony Point and an Egg Tart
quests.oneLine: The stable keeper wants a photo of the cherry blossom tree atop Satori Mountain to fill an empty frame.
quests.how: Examine the empty picture frame to begin, then travel to the top of Satori Mountain and use the Camera (Purah Pad) to photograph the lone cherry blossom tree (the whole tree just needs to be in frame). Return and show Embry the picture, and he paints a copy for the frame.

quests.name: A Picture for New Serenne Stable
quests.giver: Sprinn at New Serenne Stable (examine the empty picture frame to start)
quests.reward: 1 Pony Point and a Bright-Eyed Crab dish (Bright Tomato Mushroom Stew)
quests.oneLine: The stable clerk wants an overhead photo of the nearby geoglyph to fill an empty frame.
quests.how: Examine the empty picture frame to begin, then build a flying rig with Ultrahand (a Zonai balloon on a platform, or a balloon plus an upward Flame Emitter you strike to ascend) and rise above the geoglyph near Sinakawak Shrine to photograph it from overhead with the Camera. Return and show Sprinn the picture to complete it.

quests.name: Hestu's Concerns
quests.giver: Hestu, southeast of Lindor's Brow Skyview Tower (northwest of New Serenne Stable)
quests.reward: Unlocks Hestu's pouch (weapon/bow/shield) expansions for Korok Seeds
quests.oneLine: Hestu is too scared of nearby 'trees' to do business — deal with them so he can expand your pouch.
quests.how: Find Hestu at Lindor's Brow; he is frightened of the surrounding trees, which are actually Evermean monsters. Defeat the Evermeans (fire works well, or chop them with a sharp weapon) to calm Hestu, after which he stays and trades Korok Seeds for inventory-slot upgrades. (If you finish a temple/Regional Phenomenon before meeting him, Hestu instead relocates to Lookout Landing.)

quests.name: The Heroines' Secret
quests.giver: Rotana, the Gerudo archaeologist, in the Gerudo Shelter beneath Gerudo Town
quests.reward: A mysterious orb (used in The Mysterious Eighth)
quests.oneLine: Photograph four hidden stelae about the seven Gerudo heroines for Rotana.
quests.how: Use the Purah Pad camera to photograph all four stelae in the Shelter: behind Rotana's room (clear the rubble first), by the stairs in the mural room, in the classroom (visit late evening/early morning, not during 11AM-3PM school hours), and in the jail (get yourself arrested by removing your top or wearing the Yiga Mask). Bring the pictures back to Rotana.

quests.name: The Mysterious Eighth
quests.giver: Rotana in the Gerudo Shelter, after The Heroines' Secret
quests.reward: A Diamond
quests.oneLine: Gather eight patterned orbs to unlock a hidden chamber proving an eighth Gerudo heroine existed.
quests.how: Collect the eight orbs (from The Heroines' Secret, Dalia's Game, Lost in the Dunes, plus ones hidden in dorm bunk beds and supply boxes around the Shelter/town), then use Ultrahand to set each orb on a statue's hands to open the secret room. Ultrahand the giant orb out to the North Gerudo Ruins, work through the Gerudo Sanctuary (beat the Gibdos and clear obstacles), read the stone tablet, and report back to Rotana.

quests.name: Dalia's Game
quests.giver: Dalia, near the main entrance inside Gerudo Town
quests.reward: An orb (one of the eight for The Mysterious Eighth)
quests.oneLine: Win Dalia's little hide-and-seek/guessing game to earn an orb.
quests.how: Talk to Dalia by the main gate and play her game to win, which hands you one of the patterned orbs needed for The Mysterious Eighth.

quests.name: The Missing Owner
quests.giver: Cara, the jewelry-shop worker (in the Gerudo Shelter, or out front of the Jewelry Shop once town is restored)
quests.reward: A Diamond (save it for Pride of the Gerudo)
quests.oneLine: Track down the missing jewelry-shop owner Isha, stranded out in the desert.
quests.how: Head west to Toruma Dunes and look for the plume of smoke; crouch (L) to stay undetected by the Molduga, then rescue Isha on the rock formation. Beat the Molduga (toss a Brightbloom Seed or bomb on the sand to make it surface, hit it with bombs/arrows, then melee its belly while it's stunned), then meet Isha and Cara back at the shop for your Diamond.

quests.name: Pride of the Gerudo
quests.giver: Isha at the Jewelry Shop in Gerudo Town, after The Missing Owner
quests.reward: Scimitar of the Seven and Daybreaker shield
quests.oneLine: Bring Isha rare materials so she can forge the legendary Gerudo blade and shield.
quests.how: Gather and give Isha four Diamonds, ten Flint, a Gerudo Scimitar, and a Gerudo Shield; she then crafts and hands you the Scimitar of the Seven and the Daybreaker.

quests.name: Treasure of the Gerudo Desert
quests.giver: Riju in the throne room, after completing the Riju of Gerudo Town main quest
quests.location: Gerudo Town / West Gerudo Underground Ruins (West Barrens)
quests.reward: Vah Naboris Divine Helm
quests.oneLine: Solve Riju's riddle about the desert's sword-pointing warrior statues to find buried treasure.
quests.how: Travel northwest to the West Barrens, find the large bone ruins with a cracked patch of ground, and blow it open with a Bomb Flower to drop into the West Gerudo Underground Ruins. Follow the direction the Warrior Statues' swords point, clear the boulders blocking the way, and open the chest at the end for the Vah Naboris Divine Helm.

quests.name: To the Ruins!
quests.giver: Pokki, at the Sand-Seal Rental Shop in Gerudo Town (after Riju of Gerudo Town)
quests.reward: A Silver Rupee (100 rupees)
quests.oneLine: Give Pokki a smooth sand-seal sleigh ride out to the East Gerudo Ruins.
quests.how: Rent a Sleigh Seal from the sand-seal stall (she insists on the sleigh, not a plain seal), pick up Pokki, and drive carefully east to the East Gerudo Ruins, avoiding monster camps and sinkholes; sharp swerves or damage send you back to start over. Arrive intact for the Silver Rupee.

quests.name: Lost in the Dunes
quests.giver: Benja at Kara Kara Bazaar
quests.location: Kara Kara Bazaar / Oasis Source cavern
quests.reward: A patterned orb (for The Mysterious Eighth)
quests.oneLine: Rescue the missing caravan merchant Ponthos from an underground cavern near the oasis.
quests.how: Drop into the Kara Kara Bazaar well and follow the water, or dive into the nearby sandpit, to reach the underground Oasis Source where Ponthos is trapped. Fuse a rock-breaking weapon (or use bombs) to smash the boulders blocking the tunnels, follow the water northeast back up to the bazaar, then talk to Benja and Ponthos to earn the orb.

quests.name: Decorate with Passion
quests.giver: Boraa at Kara Kara Bazaar
quests.reward: An Electric Keese Wing (decorative material)
quests.oneLine: Show Boraa a ruby-fused weapon so she can use the gem as a decoration.
quests.how: Fuse a Ruby onto any weapon (Fuse via the right d-pad ability) and show the ruby-tipped weapon to Boraa; she hands you an Electric Keese Wing in return.

quests.name: The Iceless Icehouse
quests.giver: Anche at the Northern Icehouse
quests.location: Northern Icehouse (Gerudo Desert, north of Gerudo Town)
quests.reward: A Purple Rupee (50 rupees); repeatable daily
quests.oneLine: Make a fresh block of ice for Anche's empty icehouse using elemental tricks.
quests.how: Freeze the puddle in the middle of the room (throw an Ice Fruit or White Chuchu Jelly into it, or hit it with a Sapphire-fused weapon) to form a big ice block, then shave it down with a single Fire Fruit / Ruby-fused weapon / torch to the right size. Use Ultrahand to set the ice into the storage beside Anche and talk to her for the reward.

quests.name: Gleeok Guts
quests.giver: Malena at the Gerudo Canyon Stable area / Gerudo Desert Gateway (south of the Gerudo Canyon Well)
quests.location: Gerudo Canyon / Gerudo Desert (Flame Gleeok near Spectacle Rock)
quests.reward: 300 rupees (a Gold Rupee)
quests.oneLine: Fetch Flame Gleeok guts for Malena to cure her ailing husband.
quests.how: Travel to the Flame Gleeok southwest of the Gerudo Canyon Skyview Tower (near Spectacle Rock); shoot each of its three heads with arrows until it crashes down, then melee its body. Hand the Gleeok Guts to Malena for the 300-rupee reward.

quests.name: Cold-Endurance Contest!
quests.giver: Rahdo, at the summit of Mount Granajh in Gerudo Canyon (southeast of the Gerudo Canyon Skyview Tower)
quests.reward: 100 rupees (the combined 50-rupee pot)
quests.oneLine: Outlast an old man through the freezing desert night with cold resistance.
quests.how: Pay Rahdo 50 rupees to start, then survive the cold longer than he does by eating a cold-resistance dish or fusing a Ruby (or Fire Fruit) to your weapon for warmth; do not use a campfire. Last until morning to win the pot.

quests.name: Heat-Endurance Contest!
quests.giver: Rahdo, at the summit of Mount Granajh in Gerudo Canyon, after Cold-Endurance Contest!
quests.reward: 300 rupees (a Gold Rupee, the combined 150-rupee pot)
quests.oneLine: Outlast the old man through the scorching desert day after stripping off your gear.
quests.how: Pay Rahdo 150 rupees to start; you must strip to your undergarments (no heat-resist armor allowed), so keep your body temperature down by fusing a Sapphire (or Ice Fruit) to your weapon/shield while standing the heat. Outlast him to win the pot.

quests.name: Piaffe, Packed Away
quests.giver: Piaffe, stuck behind crates inside Gerudo Canyon Stable
quests.reward: A Pony Point
quests.oneLine: Free Piaffe by clearing all the wooden crates burying his stable counter.
quests.how: Destroy every wooden crate around Piaffe; the fastest way is to set one on fire (a Fire Fruit, flame weapon, or torch) and let the flames spread to the rest. Once they're all gone you earn a Pony Point.

quests.name: A Picture for the Closed Stable I
quests.giver: Piaffe at Gerudo Canyon Stable, after Piaffe, Packed Away
quests.location: Gerudo Canyon Stable (photo taken from the East Gerudo Sky Archipelago)
quests.reward: A Pony Point and Chilly Mushroom Risotto
quests.oneLine: Take an aerial photo of Spectacle Rock to fill the first of Piaffe's empty frames.
quests.how: Examine the empty frames to start it, then launch from the Gerudo Canyon Skyview Tower and use a rocket or fanplane to reach the East Gerudo Sky Archipelago; photograph the 'smiling' Spectacle Rock from above and show the picture to Piaffe.

quests.name: A Picture for the Closed Stable II
quests.giver: Piaffe at Gerudo Canyon Stable, after A Picture for the Closed Stable I
quests.location: Gerudo Canyon Stable (photo taken in the Gerudo Highlands)
quests.reward: A Pony Point and Spicy Mushroom Risotto
quests.oneLine: Photograph the giant sword in the Gerudo Highlands to fill Piaffe's second frame.
quests.how: Launch from the Gerudo Highlands Skyview Tower and glide to the giant sword landmark near Gerudo Summit (watch for the Frost Gleeok); photograph it and show the picture to Piaffe.

quests.name: Infiltrating the Yiga Clan
quests.giver: Mimos, outside the Yiga Clan Hideout in Karusa Valley (Gerudo Highlands, north-northwest of Gerudo Town)
quests.location: Yiga Clan Hideout, Karusa Valley (Gerudo Highlands)
quests.reward: Access to the Yiga Clan Hideout
quests.oneLine: Disguise yourself as a Yiga member to be let into their hideout.
quests.how: Collect and equip the full Yiga Armor set (head, top, and tights — found on Yiga members and in their stations), then approach and interact with the hideout's gate; the guard lets you in once you're wearing the complete disguise.

quests.name: The Yiga Clan Exam
quests.giver: The Yiga Blademaster at the Yiga Blademaster Station, after Infiltrating the Yiga Clan
quests.location: Yiga Blademaster Station, Gerudo region (Gerudo Canyon / behind a waterfall)
quests.reward: A Ruby and a Pristine Eightfold Longblade (also opens access to Suariwak Shrine)
quests.oneLine: Pass the Yiga's initiation by leaving banana offerings at their hidden frog statues.
quests.how: Wear the Yiga disguise, talk to the Blademaster to get five bunches of Mighty Bananas and the five frog-statue locations pinned on your map, then visit each frog statue (marked with the upside-down Yiga eye) and place a Mighty Banana on its offering plate. Return to the Blademaster to claim the Ruby and Pristine Eightfold Longblade.

quests.name: Ruffian-Infested Village
quests.giver: Rozel, hiding on the bluff at the entrance overlooking Lurelin Village (near Sifumim Shrine)
quests.reward: Frees the village and unlocks the Lurelin Village Restoration Project (Rozel has nothing to give until the town is rebuilt)
quests.oneLine: Monster-force pirates have seized Lurelin Village; clear every enemy occupying it to retake the town.
quests.how: Talk to Rozel to start, then sweep the whole village, beach, pirate ship and well, killing all the invaders (Bokoblins, Lizalfos, Moblins and a Boss Bokoblin on the ship). Fuse a strong horn or rock to a sturdy weapon for damage; since these enemies can't swim, you can knock the big ones into the sea to drown them. Clear every enemy marker to finish.

quests.name: Lurelin Village Restoration Project
quests.giver: Bolson, with Hudson's crew in the plaza of the cleared Lurelin Village
quests.reward: Rebuilds the village; the inn (free bed), restaurant (one free meal a day) and shops reopen, plus a free play at the Lucky Treasure Shop minigame
quests.oneLine: After the pirates are gone, help Bolson's crew rebuild Lurelin's wrecked buildings.
quests.how: Available after Ruffian-Infested Village; talk to Bolson, who needs 15 Logs and 20 Hylian Rice. Knock down regular trees (not the village palms) for logs and Ultrahand them to him, and cut grass around Faron for Hylian Rice, then keep talking to Bolson as each of the five buildings is restored until the project completes.

quests.name: Lurelin Resort Project
quests.giver: Bolson, in the rebuilt Lurelin Village
quests.reward: Unlocks the Lurelin Water Rally (a free water-racing attraction)
quests.oneLine: Help Bolson dream up a new tourist attraction for the rebuilt village — a water rally — and recruit racers for it.
quests.how: After the Restoration Project, talk to Bolson and suggest hosting a Water Rally. Travel to the Hudson Construction Site near Tarrey Town and recruit the two Gerudo racers there (fix their boat with Ultrahand, then beat their course), then return to Bolson in Lurelin to open the Water Rally.

quests.name: A Way to Trade, Washed Away
quests.giver: Garini, by the general store in Lurelin Village
quests.location: Lurelin Village / Tenoko Island, off the southern coast
quests.reward: Star Fragment; reopens Garini's General Store (free stock)
quests.oneLine: Garini's trading boat drifted out to sea in the pirate attack — retrieve a boat from Tenoko Island.
quests.how: Talk to Garini, then head out to Tenoko Island where a boat has washed ashore. Ultrahand a Zonai steering stick plus a fan and battery onto the stranded boat, sail it back to the pier at Lurelin, and report to Garini.
